title: This Stunning Zoceli Narum is For Sale
content:
Martin Saida’s Zoceli Bikes makes some of the coolest looking steel full suspensions on the market. While his operation builds bikes with a wait time for production, from time to time he has refurbed frames in stock. Yesterday he announced a size XL Narum for sale for €2.100. It’s got a fresh powdercoat and was equipped with new bearings and links. These refurbs come with a factory warranty and are ready to roll.

Head on over to Zoceli to see the geo and ordering information.

The post This Stunning Zoceli Narum is For Sale appeared first on The Radavist.
author: John Watson
